_schema.note: One record per (country x version). Themes NOT listed are scored 0 (absent) and need no evidence. Every listed theme has score >= 1 with a quote + rationale + confidence. For single-verse / no-gap anthems, as-written and as-sung records are identical. Quotes are English translations unless noted; 'translation-sensitive' flags scores that could swing on translation choice.
_schema.v2_note: Themes 11-13 (labour_work, flag, ancestors_heritage) promoted from wildcard and scored in a 2026-05-28 augmentation pass; the other 10 themes carried over from v1 unchanged. Composites (belligerence/deity/crown) are identical to v1.

sacrifice.rationale: an explicit collective vow to defend the homeland

monarch.rationale: explicit loyalty to the ruling Amir

unity_brotherhood.rationale: single reference to the collective of 'free countrymen'

glory_pride.rationale: majesty, dignity and glory of the country invoked explicitly
